name: ALEXANDRIA REAL ESTATE EQUITIES, INC.
business: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. is a life science REIT that owns, operates, and develops collaborative Megacampus ecosystems in AAA life science innovation clusters. It leases space to tenants including multinational pharmaceutical companies, biotechnology companies, medical device companies, digital health firms, advanced technology and agtech companies, academic and medical research institutions, U.S. government research agencies, non-profit organizations, and venture capital firms.
sellsTo: life science product, service, and medical device companies

exposures.sentence: Our tenants include multinational pharmaceutical companies; public and private biotechnology companies; life science product, service, and medical device companies; digital health, advanced technology, and agtech companies; academic and medical research institutions; U.S. government research agencies; non-profit organizations; and venture capital firms.

catalysts.event: Anticipate delivery of $97 million incremental annual net operating income from development and redevelopment pipeline by 4Q26
catalysts.sentence: Alexandria's development and redevelopment pipeline delivered incremental annual net operating income of $10 million, commencing during the three months ended December 31, 2025, with an additional $97 million of incremental annual net operating income anticipated to deliver by 4Q26 primarily from projects that are 86% leased/negotiating.

catalysts.event: Complete $2.90 billion of dispositions and sales of partial interests in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete dispositions and sales of partial interests of approximately $2.90 billion at the midpoint of our 2026 guidance range.

catalysts.event: Reduce outstanding debt by approximately $1.68 billion in 2026
catalysts.sentence: we expect to reduce our outstanding debt by approximately $1.68 billion, at the midpoint of our 2026 guidance range.

catalysts.event: Substantially complete large-scale non-core asset sales program in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to substantially complete our large-scale non-core asset sales program in 2026.
